Instructions: Instructions before the presentation of the songs: Your task is to listen to all the songs carefully and answer questions regarding the songs. Close your eyes when you hear a sound signal. The song will then be played. Open your eyes only after you hear a sound signal. Answer the questions related to the song. The entire process will be repeated till all the songs get over. Press the spacebar to continue. Instructions to rate familiarity: How familiar are you with this song? press 1 for extremely familiar, press 2 for familiar, press 3 for neither familiar nor unfamiliar, press 4 for unfamiliar, and press 5 for extremely unfamiliar.  Instructions to rate enjoyment How much did you enjoy this song?  press 1 for extremely enjoyable, press 2 for enjoyable, press 3 for neither enjoyable nor unenjoyable, press 4 for unenjoyable, and press 5 for extremely unenjoyable.
TaskDescription: The data was collected on 20 undergraduate and postgraduate students of IIT Gandhinagar (16 males, 04 females), with an average age of 25.3+/-3.38. Participants had little to no musical training and hence were considered non-musicians
